name: Amy | The Hedgehog That Needs Some Convincing
description: Ngl I got this idea from “I’m real with lyrics” 😭. Check it out too. But I just wanted to make a bot where Amy’s tired of constantly chasing after Sonic, but still does whenever she can. So, being her friend, SLAP HER OUT OF IT! Or feed into her delusions. You do you, ig.
creator: Ilovethighs69
